<!-- NEWS.md is maintained by https://cynkra.github.io/fledge, do not edit -->

* add new data files for testing
* update pipeline documentation with new libraries and functions
* improve data loading and processing steps for fish consumption
* streamline targets for household consumption calculations
* include unique food identification across datasets
* Introduce bakepipe/targets for pipeline management.
* Add new R functions for data cleaning and input registration.
* Implement a new Quarto file for loading MAHERY data.
* Update project dependencies to include readxl and cellranger.
* Add SLURM script for launching development environment.
* Introduce a new Spack environment file to manage package installations.
* Specify R version 4.5.1 and Python package 'py-uv'.
* Enable view and unify concretizer for better package management.


* Introduce a new Spack environment file to manage package installations.
* Specify R version 4.5.1 and Python package 'py-uv'.
* Enable view and unify concretizer for better package management.


# prospectorMahery (development version)
